feed.title: STUF - Language Typology and Universals...
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from STUF - Language Typology and Universals... (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Is the contrasting correlation between the consonantality of conative animal calls and the vocalicity of interjections accidental or motivated? The case of Gorwaa
entry.summary: Authors: Alexander Andrason, Andrew Harvey DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2026-2002 Pages: Page range: 1-39

entry.title: A variety-driven approach to Goal-Source (a)symmetries
entry.summary: Authors: Maja Robbers DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2026-2001 Pages: Page range: 41-81

entry.title: Concessive conditionals and language contact: the case of Cappadocian Greek
entry.summary: Authors: Tom Bossuyt, Eline Daveloose DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2026-2003 Pages: Page range: 83-125

entry.title: Lithuanian and the syntactic structure of pseudo-clefts
entry.summary: Authors: Axel Holvoet DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2026-2004 Pages: Page range: 127-146
